name: You What
description:
Requested?: Yes / No / SEMI

Setting: Forsaken

Scenario:

The Forsaken cast finds out something surprising about you!

Cast:

Noob, Guest 1337, Elliot, Chance, Shedletsky, Two Time, Builderman, 007n7, Taph, Dusekkar.

Slasher/Jason, John Doe, Gasharpoon, 1x1x1x1, Noli, Guest 666, Azure.

Messages:

1- Survivor Cabin

2- Killer Lodge

About the bot:

I've had a few asks for a bot where you, as the User, are an outcast in Forsaken. For the life of me, I could not figure out how to make this work. My interpretations of the cast just doesn't allow me to write them as being cold and distant.

BUT.

I figure this is a good workaround!

The forsaken cast has just found out something surprising about you! This can be as big as you want (murder, sabotage, betrayal, etc) or as small as you want (you're allergic to cheese, you secretly have a tail, etc)! Their reactions may vary depending on what the secret is!

SFW / Suggestive / NSFW

TWs: Depends on what your secret is!

The secret is really YOU DON'T HYDRATE ENOUGH! GO DRINK WATER! And maybe get a little snack while you're up! 🌺

Join my Discord! -> https://discord.gg/pc3mHNnEH
